name: Marco Island Key Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. PECAN CRUST: Saute pecans in butter until lightly browned. Place nuts and butter in a food processor. Add the crumbs, lime peel, cinnamon, sugar, and mix until coarse. Press into a 10-inch pie plate. Reserve some for garnish if desired.
2. PIE FILLING: Beat egg yolks at high speed for 4-5 minutes. Slowly add condensed milk with the mixer running at medium speed. Add key lime juice in the same manner. Add peel and mix slowly. Pour mixture into the prepared crust.
3. BAKING: Fill baking pan halfway with water and place on the lowest rack of the oven. Place pie plate on a rack above the water and bake at 300°F until firm, 20-25 minutes. Do not allow the pie to brown.
4. COOLING AND SETTING: Remove the pie and let it cool to room temperature. Place in the refrigerator to set and chill for about 4 hours before serving. Garnish with whipped cream and crust crumbs if desired.
